drl:
rule "R0"
salience -9
when
    accumulate( T0($s0_0 : f1); $a0_0 : sum($s0_0) )
then
    insert(new T1(true, false));
    insert(new T1(true, true));

rule "R1"

when
    T1($b1_0_0 : f0)
    not T1(f0 != $b1_0_0)
    T0(f0 != true, f1 >= 2.5, $b1_2_0 : f0)

end
rule "R2"
when
    T1(f1 == true, f0 != true, $b2_0_0 : f0, $b2_0_1 : f1)
then
end
query Q0(boolean $qa0_0, long $qa0_1)
    ( $qp0_0 : T0(f0 == $qa0_0) and $qp0_1 : T1(f1 != true, f1 != true, $qb0_0 : f1) )
    or
    ( $qp0_2 : T0(f1 == $qa0_1, f1 <= -1000000007) and $qp0_3 : T0(f1 <= -5, f0 != false, $qb0_1 : f0) )
end

rule QR0 salience 10
when
    T1(f0 == false, $qr0_b0 : f0)
    ?Q0(true, -5;)
    ?Q0(true, 100;)
then
    insert(new QOut(1, 100, 5.5, "zz", true));
end
